content:
I am a PhD Research Scholar at the Department of Economics of NHH Norwegian School of Economics. I am affiliated to the FAIR - The Choice Lab research group. My research is in behavioral economics and economics of education, with a focus on group identity and the use of experimental methods.
I will join the Department of Economics at Aalto University as a Postdoctoral researcher in May 2024.

My research is in behavioral economics and economics of education, with a focus on group identity and the use of experimental methods.
title: Daniel Carvajal
Will Artificial Intelligence get in the way of gender equality?

summary: This paper finds that social context, defined by the individuals that surround us, is a key determinant of ingroup favoritism.
title: Exposure to diversity, social proximity and ingroup bias
The role of a majority-minority status and ingroup affinity in shaping social preferences
